---
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: plain
---
:::: columns

::: {.column width = "40%"}
Image 2
:::

:::{.column width = "5%"}
:::

::: {.column width = "55%"}
Description aslkfjaslkdfj 
adsfjasdfl asf
asdfklasdjf 
asdjfkaklsdf
aklsdfja
:::

::::
